name: C-15 freshness gate exits one when last-fetch marker exceeds the fetch-frequency window
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-20T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/soc2-tsc.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id soc2-tsc --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'stale' err.txt && echo stale 1>&2
